heading: Wearable AI & Voice Hardware
search_queries: wearable AI pendants pins lifelogging devices 2026
search_strategy: The Apple-3-wearables, OpenAI Sweetpea, Qualcomm Snapdragon Wear Elite, Memories.ai LUCI, Neuphonic, Bee, PLAUD, Motorola Maxwell, Limitless-Meta cluster is covered 3–4+ times. Do not re-cover unless concrete new development (FCC filing, prototype leak, launch date, keynote). Prefer genuinely new hardware, new chipsets, new voice models, teacher-classroom use-case reporting.

covered.title: The Awakening of Physical AI Hardware

ongoing_narrative: The wearable AI + voice hardware thread through late March to early April 2026 has a clear structural picture: Apple's three-device program (glasses 2027, pendant/pin TBD, camera AirPods) is the maturation signal; OpenAI Sweetpea + screenless pocket device define the Jony-Ive voice-first form factor; Qualcomm Snapdragon Wear Elite is the enabling silicon (on-chip Hexagon NPU, 2B-param on-device, sub-25ms latency, 30% battery); Memories.ai LUCI is the privacy-first on-device lifelogging architecture; Neuphonic's sub-25ms threshold makes ambient interaction feel natural. Bee, PLAUD, Motorola Maxwell, Limitless-now-Meta populate the second tier. 2024/25 cloud-dependent generation (Humane, Rabbit) is discredited; 2026 is on-device + privacy-architected. Teacher-classroom transcription is emerging as a productivity vertical. Next to hunt: FCC filings, prototype leaks, keynote dates from past 7 days; Samsung/Google on-device voice models; battery, thermal, privacy-policy news.
